programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

programme.title: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
programme.desc: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Step into the heart of innovation with The Big Reveal! Join Sheriff Mark Lamb and MMA legend Ken Shamrock as they explore groundbreaking American companies revolutionizing their industries. From elite camo designed through deer vision science to lightweight titanium firearm suppressors and EMF-neutralizing tech for peak performance—each story uncovers passion, ingenuity, and grit. Discover what’s shaping America’s entrepreneurial spirit. It’s not just business. It’s The Big Reveal.

programme.title: Boom America

Backed by his team of successful entrepreneurs, Kevin meets with businesses to jumpstart their success and take them to a whole new level. From Nuethix, a supplement line struggling with client acquisition and education, to Stream2Sea, a eco-friendly sunscreen wanting to become a household name—Kevin and the A-team are ready to jump in and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Journey Through Corsica
programme.desc: Journey Through Corsica – Full Length Film (4K) | NatureStream.tv Embark on a breathtaking aerial and sea-level journey across the wild west coast of Corsica — where red granite cliffs plunge into turquoise coves, and the Mediterranean meets raw island wilderness. This preview trailer features spectacular drone cinematography and boat-based footage filmed around the Scandola Nature Reserve, Girolata Bay, and the rugged coastlines near Piana and Porto — some of the most dramatic seascapes in Europe. 🕊️ A NatureStream.tv Original — cinematic nature films designed for relaxation, focus, and pure visual immersion.

programme.title: Rainforest Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax in the soothing greens of the rainforest in our newest release "Rainforest Relaxation". Clear creeks flow amongst the ancient ferns, and moss covered trees create intriguing forms and texture in this 45 minute nature film featuring the beauty of the Hoh rainforest in Olympic National Park. Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: S1E1 Driven
programme.desc:
GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN takes you deep inside the world of Supercross and Motocross champion James Stewart. Ride alongside the man known as the fastest on two wheels as he shares the highs, lows, and relentless drive that shaped his legendary career.
GoPro Original Series DRIVEN also follows X Games star and snowmobile icon Chris Burandt. Join him on a thrilling journey to discover what fuels his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. This is raw, high-octane storytelling you can’t miss.

programme.title: S1E2 Driven
programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: S1E3 Driven
programme.desc: Three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano continues to push the limits on the track while finding new ways to use his racing platform to make a positive impact on others. In this episode of GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN, step into the world of DC Shoes co-founder, rally car driver, and marketing mastermind Ken Block. Strap in for an electrifying journey through the moments and passions that have fueled his remarkable career.

programme.title: S1E2 Karl Meyer

programme.title: S4E1 Bike
programme.desc: When the sun sets, GoPro Awards recipient Nikolaj Juhlsen lights up the Austrian forest on his downhill mountain bike, GoPro MAX mounted and headlamp blazing. Watch Jonny Livorti take on a daring staircase ride overlooking the Italian Riviera, where speed, finesse, and bravery are essential for this epic descent in Liguria, Italy. Why hike when you can mountain bike? Experience jaw-dropping trails, fearless riders, and the ultimate daredevil MTB action.
